  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' primarily calls for sentence- and paragraph-level wording, flow, and concision improvements to the abstract.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should maintain appropriate hedging and signal uncertainty where the original text implies it.",
    "RX.2": "Rephrasing must avoid amplifying unsupported claims (e.g., 'first work') or overstating results.",
    "RX.3": "Work must stay within polishing the existing abstract without altering technical content or adding new analyses.",
    "RX.4": "Language changes should not encourage unsafe over-trust in translations given the safety-sensitive use cases discussed.",
    "RX.5": "All numerical results and claims must remain traceable to the original text without introducing unverifiable content."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' primarily calls for sentence- and paragraph-level wording, flow, and concision improvements to the abstract.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should maintain appropriate hedging and signal uncertainty where the original text implies it.
rationale.RX.2: Rephrasing must avoid amplifying unsupported claims (e.g., 'first work') or overstating results.
rationale.RX.3: Work must stay within polishing the existing abstract without altering technical content or adding new analyses.
rationale.RX.4: Language changes should not encourage unsafe over-trust in translations given the safety-sensitive use cases discussed.
rationale.RX.5: All numerical results and claims must remain traceable to the original text without introducing unverifiable content.
